product_overview: FinResilience Pro is a personal wealth orchestration app for Indian salaried users that captures income, debts, expenses, and tax investments to generate deterministic financial guidance. It presents actionable dashboard outputs, financial health indicators, an AI narrative, and client-side report export.
core_goals: Enter personal financial information to generate a deterministic financial analysis
Review recommended next financial actions based on debts, savings, and tax considerations
Inspect month-by-month payoff progress and financial health metrics
Read contextual AI guidance alongside deterministic fallback content
Export a financial report from the dashboard

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Users can start the app from the landing view and move into the main dashboard or authentication flow.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe the landing page -> Choose to get started -> See the dashboard view
Navigate to / -> Observe the landing page -> Choose to log in -> See the authentication view

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can sign in or create an account with email and password.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the login view -> Enter email and password -> Submit the form -> See the authenticated dashboard
Navigate to / -> Open the signup view -> Enter email and password -> Submit the form -> See the authenticated dashboard
Navigate to / -> Open the login view -> Enter an invalid email or password -> Submit the form -> See validation feedback

features.name: Financial Dashboard & Input Form
features.description: Users enter income, expenses, debts, and tax-related financial details to generate an analysis.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the financial input form -> Enter income, expenses, and debt details -> Submit the analysis request -> See the results dashboard
Navigate to / -> Open the financial input form -> Enter a negative or invalid amount -> Submit the form -> See validation feedback

Navigate to / -> Open the financial input form -> Enter income, expenses, debts, and tax investments -> Submit the analysis request -> See the next-rupee action cards, payoff schedule, and financial health gauges

features.name: Agentic Chat
features.description: Users can ask the financial assistant questions and receive deterministic chat responses.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the chat panel -> Type a message -> Send the message -> See the assistant response
Navigate to / -> Open the chat panel -> Type a follow-up question about finances -> Send the message -> See the updated conversation thread

features.name: What-If Scenarios
features.description: Users can simulate financial changes to understand alternate outcomes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the what-if scenario panel -> Select a scenario -> Enter an amount -> Run the simulation -> See the projected financial outcome
Navigate to / -> Open the what-if scenario panel -> Select a scenario -> Enter a valid amount -> Run the simulation -> See the updated comparison result

routes.description: Main application page with conditional rendering for views

user_interactions: Click "Get Started" to go to dashboard
Click "Log In" to go to login view
